Digital Marketing Dashboard

ROLLER — Digital Marketing
Last Updated: 30 Mar 2026, 04:32 PM




Reporting Notes
  • Excluded channels: Display channel has zero MQL data in this dataset.
  • Data discrepancies: Total pipeline data may differ slightly from source systems due to how we aggregate the data. We rely on Channel, Count, and ACV fields to match every record.
  • First touch attribution: All records using Original Marketing Channel for MQLs. S2 first touch uses Original Marketing Channel sourced from Pipeline Data.
  • Last touch attribution: Using Channel data for both MQL and S2 sourced from latest interaction record.

Paid Search Performance — Last 6 Months

Rolling 6-month window ending at the last month in the selected date range. MQL/S2 metrics follow the selected attribution filter. ROAS shown for both first and last touch. ROAS = S2 Piped ACV ÷ Ad Spend.

Campaign Performance

Filtered by selected date range. MQL/S2 metrics follow the selected attribution filter. Campaign resolved via UTM→AdWords mapping with drill-down fallback.

Keyword Performance

Filtered by selected date range. MQL/S2 metrics follow the selected attribution filter. Non-brand sorted by MQL count; brand sorted by clicks.
